ISSUES:
- [severity:info] /Users/younghwankang/WORK/WORKSPACE/KiiPS/KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/COM/ofc_doc/DAEJEON/COMM_OFCIAL_DOC.jsp:647 - The 2-second timeout for `window.print()` is a heuristic; on slow connections or with large images (stamps), the print dialog might trigger before resources are fully rendered.

VERDICT: looks-good
SUMMARY: The changes correctly resolve multi-page printing issues by removing fixed height constraints (`100vh`) and implement a robust auto-print trigger via localStorage.

issues.text: /Users/younghwankang/WORK/WORKSPACE/KiiPS/KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/COM/ofc_doc/DAEJEON/COMM_OFCIAL_DOC.jsp:647 - The 2-second timeout for `window.print()` is a heuristic; on slow connections or with large images (stamps), the print dialog might trigger before resources are fully rendered.

summary: The changes correctly resolve multi-page printing issues by removing fixed height constraints (`100vh`) and implement a robust auto-print trigger via localStorage.
